summary: Completed TASK-134: Created comprehensive drag-and-drop interactions & feedback states UX specification (docs/ux/drag-drop-interactions.md). Covers 5 drag interaction types (sidebar-to-canvas, toolbar quick-add, node move, handle-to-handle edge creation, canvas pan), full visual feedback state matrices, animation timing tokens, touch/trackpad support, keyboard accessibility alternatives, screen reader announcements, reduced motion support, error handling, and performance safeguards. Updated backlog to mark TASK-134 as done.
